title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 vs Galaxy Watch 8: What are the differences? - Engadget
summary: The Galaxy Watch 9 is a relatively modest update over last year's model. Samsung's new Galaxy Watch 9 has landed , and on the surface it looks a lot like the Watch 8 it replaces.
